title: tempting norwegian narutomaki poke
description: a unique norwegian dish featuring narutomaki and a fun cheese-pull experience
instructions: mix 1 cup of water and 1 tsp of sodium alginate in a bowl
add 1 tsp of sugar and stir to dissolve
add 1 tsp of salt and stir to dissolve
heat the mixture to 180 degrees fahrenheit
immerse narutomaki in the mixture and let it spherify for 2 minutes
remove the narutomaki from the mixture and rinse with cold water
pat dry the narutomaki with paper towels
heat 2 tbsp of sesame oil in a pan over medium heat
add 1 cup of edamame hummus and cook for 2 minutes
add 1 cup of cottage cheese and cook for 2 minutes
add 1 tbsp of miso paste and cook for 1 minute
season with black pepper to taste
garnish with chopped scallions, toasted sesame seeds, furikake, and grated daikon
serve with narutomaki skewers, rice vinegar, and yuzu juice
